title: 🗓 M3.6 - Requirements Engineering
body:
Tracking issue for milestone M3.6 — Requirements Engineering.
Due: 2026-04-18

## Objective
Establish proper requirement traceability across all functional areas.
Every test must reference a requirement. Every requirement must have a test.

## Issues
- [ ] [REQ] Add EQP functional area to REQUIREMENTS.md
- [ ] [REQ] Add EPS functional area to REQUIREMENTS.md
- [ ] [REQ] Restructure test directory
- [ ] [REQ] Ensure every test is traced to a requirement
- [ ] [REQ] Generate requirements traceability matrix

## Definition of Done
- EQP and EPS functional areas in REQUIREMENTS.md
- Tests reorganised into unit/equipment/integration/spacecraft
- Every test has @pytest.mark.requirement() marker
- Traceability matrix generated after each CI run
- CI green

title: 🗓 M4.5 - Model Wiring close-out
body:
Tracking issue for M4.5 close-out.
Due: 2026-04-25

## Objective
Complete remaining M4.5 items and close the milestone cleanly.

## Issues
- [ ] [ORC] Implement svf_command_schedule mark
- [ ] [MOD] Decompose EPS into SolarArray, Battery, PCDU FMUs
- [ ] [SIM] Implement model-to-model wiring via ParameterStore
- [ ] [SIM] Add SSP system description support

## Definition of Done
- svf_command_schedule implemented and tested
- TC-PWR-003 and TC-PWR-005 rewritten as proper multi-phase tests
- SSP support assessed
- CI green

title: 🗓 M5 - Campaign & Reporting
body:
Tracking issue for milestone M5 — Campaign & Reporting.
Due: 2026-05-16

## Objective
YAML campaign manager and ECSS-aligned test reporting.
Turns SVF from a test tool into a certification-ready platform.

## Issues
- [ ] [CAM] Implement YAML campaign schema and loader
- [ ] [CAM] Implement campaign executor
- [ ] [CAM] SHA-256 campaign file hashing
- [ ] [CAM] Per-test-case timeout support
- [ ] [REP] ECSS-E-ST-10-02C structured test records
- [ ] [REP] Requirements traceability matrix in HTML report
- [ ] [REP] Allure HTML report integration
- [ ] [REP] JUnit XML with ECSS verdict and requirement metadata

## Definition of Done
- Campaign YAML runs EPS test procedures end to end
- Output includes JUnit XML + Allure HTML + ECSS test records
- Traceability matrix links requirements to verdicts
- CI green

title: 🗓 v0.1 - First Release
body:
Tracking issue for v0.1 release.
Due: 2026-05-30

## Objective
First demoable, credible release of OpenSVF.

## Completion criteria
- [ ] M3.6 Requirements Engineering complete
- [ ] M4.5 Model Wiring close-out complete
- [ ] M5 Campaign & Reporting complete
- [ ] README updated with quick-start guide
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md updated
- [ ] GitHub release tag created
- [ ] All tests green
- [ ] mypy strict clean
- [ ] No open BASELINED requirements unimplemented

## Demo script
1. Show wiring YAML connecting SolarArray + Battery + PCDU
2. Run pytest campaign against decomposed EPS
3. Show Allure HTML report with ECSS verdicts
4. Show traceability matrix linking EPS-001 through EPS-010 to test cases
